function[T0: Group, T1: Group, T5](x0: GroupHom[T0, T1], x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: MulAction[T1, T5], x4: T5) { x0.hom(x1) != x0.hom(x2) or restricted_action[T0, T1, T5](x0, x3).act(x1, x4) = restricted_action[T0, T1, T5](x0, x3).act(x2, x4) }[H, G, X](phi, h2, h1, a, w0)

goal: is_transitive_action[G, X](a) = forall(x0: X, x1: X) { orbit[G, X](a, x0).contains(x1) }

p.c: function[T0, T1: Group](x0: MulAction[T1, T0]) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x2 ∈ orbit[T1, T0](x0, x1) } = is_transitive_action[T1, T0](x0) }[X, G](a)
function[T0: Group, T1](x0: MulAction[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { not is_transitive_action[T0, T1](x0) or x2 ∈ orbit[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[G, X](a, x, y)

p.c: function[T0, T1: Group](x0: MulAction[T1, T0]) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x2 ∈ orbit[T1, T0](x0, x1) } = is_transitive_action[T1, T0](x0) }[X, H](restricted_action[H, G, X](phi, a))

goal: restricted_action[H, G, X](phi, a).act(h1, x) = restricted_action[H, G, X](phi, a).act(h2, x)

p.c: not forall(x0: X) { a.act(phi.hom(h1), x0) = a.act(phi.hom(h2), x0) } or not is_faithful_action[G, X](a)
